name: Dragonscales
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Neutral time this Reincarnation. Effect is ×7.5x stronger on Stone Pillars, Labyrinths and Hall of Legends.
formula: (0.3 * x^0.7)%; (7.5 * x^0.75)% on Stone Pillars/Labyrinths/HoL; x = Neutral time this Reincarnation

name: Iron Flight
effect: Increase production of Iron Stronghold by 200% per spell affecting it. Also reduces Dragon's Breath tier cost scaling by 0.3.
formula: ×200% per active spell effect on Iron Stronghold

name: Imposing Presence
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration additively based on Neutral buildings built. Also multiplicatively increase assistants by 75% while White Breath is active.
formula: +(0.7 * x^0.7), where x = Neutral buildings built

name: Dragonborn
effect: Increase assistants additively and multiplicatively, and their production, based on all time spent as Dragons (All Time).
formula: Additive: +(5 * x^0.5); Mult: (0.5 * x^0.25)%; Prod: (0.7 * x^0.3)%; x = Dragons time (All Time)

name: Bountiful Hoard
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Artifacts found.

name: Sharp Claws
effect: Multiplicatively increase Royal Exchange bonus and Faction Coin find chance based on clicks made this Era.
formula: FC: (0.8 * x^0.4)%; RE: (x^0.5)%; x = clicks this Era

name: Ancient Hunger
effect: Increase Maximum Mana additively and multiplicatively based on Faction Coins found this Era.
formula: Additive: +(15 * ln(1+x)^2.5); Mult: (0.5 * ln(1+x)^1.5)%; x = FC found this Era

name: Eternal Wisdom
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Royal Exchange bonus.
formula: (1.5 * x^0.75)%, where x = individual Royal Exchange bonus

name: Chromatic Scales
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on active Dragon's Breath effects. Also increase offline production by 100%.
formula: (250 * x^2)%, where x = active Dragon's Breath effects

name: Fang Food
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration and Assistants based on highest Dragon Pastures built this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.6 * x^0.6)%, where x = highest Dragon Pastures this Reincarnation

name: Wyrm's Rest
effect: Increase the Ascension multiplier for Royal Market bonus by 0.7. White Breath also multiplicatively increases Assistants based on Dragon time this Reincarnation.
formula: (1.25 * ln(1+x)^1.25)%, where x = Dragon time this Reincarnation

name: Draconic Supremacy
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Maximum Mana.
